name: Chicken & Broccoli with Linguine
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch cubes
10 Sun-dried tomatoes, soaked in hot water for 10 minutes (optional)
1/4 cup Dry vermouth or white wine
10 oz Linguine, cooked according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into cubes and sprinkle with pepper.
2. Soak sun-dried tomatoes in hot water for 10 minutes.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large, heavy, non-stick skillet; sauté chicken just until no longer pink, about 5 minutes. Remove from pan.
4. Add remaining 1/2 tablespoon olive oil to skillet; stir in onion and sauté until softened but not browned, about 2 minutes.
5. Stir in garlic, zucchini, and broccoli. Add 3/4 cup of the chicken broth, cover, and simmer 3-5 minutes, or until broccoli is crisp-tender.
6. Combine oregano and cornstarch with remaining 3/4 cup chicken broth and add to vegetables. Return chicken to pan, add hot red pepper flakes, and cook over brisk heat until slightly thickened and bubbly.
7. Heat cream in microwave for 30 seconds; stir into pan. Season to taste with salt and pepper and serve immediately over linguine or other pasta.
